calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Post-Judgment Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-19-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO COMMERCIAL BUILDERS, INC.'S Motion For Post-Judgment Fees And Costs is taken off Calendar. Case settled. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Darin Leviloff, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, SAN FRANCISCO COMMERCIAL BUILDERS, INC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) FULL WHEEL, LLC, a California limited liability co.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
John Ciapponi sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $27,223.67
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,876.66
Attorney's Fees: $8,127.00
Costs: $859.40
Total Judgment in the amount of $38,086.73
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2014 Continued To Feb-18-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
